verses.text: Topa aw, ka thungetna hong za in la, kong thumnate hong ngai in. Na thumanna leh na thutakna tawh kizui-in kei hong dawng in
Na nasempa, thu hong sit kei in. Bang hang hiam cih leh nangma mai-ah mihing a dikzo kuamah omlo hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh gal in kei hong bawlsia-in hong zogawp hi. Sauveipi lai-a a site bangin a mial sungah hong tusak hi
Tua ahih ciangin cihna ding ka thei nawn kei a, ka lungtangah si teng nawnlo hi
Hun luite ka phawk a, na sepsa khempeuh ka ngaihsunsun hi. Na khut in a sepsa nate ka lungngaingai hi
Thu ngenin nang lamah ka khutte ka hong zan a, lei keu in tui a duh bangin nang ka hong duh hi
Topa aw, kei hong dawng mengmeng in. Kei ka cimawh ta hi. Leihawm sung misite kiangah a paisukte tawh ka kibat lohna dingin kei kiang panin na maitang seel kei in
Nang hong muang ka hih manin zingsang simin na itna kip kei hong phawksak in. Nangma tungah thu hong ngen ka hih manin ka paina ding lampi hong hilh ta in
Topa aw, ka langte' kiang panin kei hong honkhia in. Nangmah a bel dingin ka hong tai hi
Keima Pasian na hih manin nangma deih bangin a gamta dingin kei hong hilh in. Kei hong hehpih in la, lam phei-ah hong kha in
Topa aw, nangma min na ngaihsutna-in keima nuntakna hong kem in. Nangma thumanna tawh kituakin haksatna panin hong paikhiatpih in
Kei pen nangma nasem ka hih manin na itna kip tawh kituakin ka galte khenkhia in la, ka langte khempeuh susia in.
